title: Intensely Rich Algerian Cashew Nuts Tagine
description: A rich and gooey Algerian dish featuring cashew nuts, this tagine is a Mediterranean-friendly delight, cooked to perfection in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, and salt.
Add the roasted and chopped cashew nuts and cook for 2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water to the pressure cooker and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Line a steamer basket with banana leaves and place the cashew nut mixture in the center.
Fold the banana leaves over the mixture to form a packet and steam for 10 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
